archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
archetype.vibe: Authority, clarity, functional, rigid, modern minimal startup vibe
archetype.rationale: Perfect for a SaaS platform needing clear data hierarchy (Admin/Partner portals) and straightforward, high-conversion user flows (User progress stepper). Colors exist only to guide action.

rules: Use #002FA7 strictly for primary CTAs and active states in the stepper.
Never use pure black; use #0A0A0A for deepest text and backgrounds.
Background should be stark white or off-white. Contrast is achieved through 1px sharp borders and typography.
Interactive elements must explicitly set hover colors with increased contrast (e.g., hover:bg-[#002280] hover:text-white).

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

rules: Use extreme weight contrast: Black for headings, Regular/Medium for body.
Ensure tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) on all headings over 32px.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing for marketing, dense 'Control Room' grids for dashboards.

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12 (Mode A: Tetris Grid, aggressive asymmetry)
grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 (Mode B: Control Room Grid, pure utility)

rules: Mobile-first always. Images must not exceed max-h-[80vh] on mobile.
Grid children must be direct children. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts to ensure asymmetry.
Containers with borders must use internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/10 shadow-sm. Never transparent.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders variant: flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.

navigation.desktop: Visible links (Home, About Us, Partners), no hamburger menu.
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu allowed. Sticky header with z-50.

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn based, sharp edges, no excessive border radius (max rounded-sm).
forms_and_inputs.uploads: Clear dropzones with dashed 1px borders, subtle hover state (bg-gray-50).

stepper.mobile: Full-width screen-by-screen flow. Sticky header showing step title. Bottom-anchored Next/Back buttons for thumb reach.
stepper.desktop: Vertical milestone or compact horizontal bar. Gamified unlocking.

components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

rules: Hover states on all interactables. Lighter hue of active state.

image_urls.description: Minimalist facade against dark sky. Use with a light overlay or as a stark contrast piece in the hero section.
Buildings and fabric. Use as a textural background or feature image for the SaaS landing page.
People working in a modern office. Use for the About Us section.
Colleagues collaborating at a desk. Secondary image for About Us.
Company logo isolated. Use in the Partners listing or slider.

rules: Hero image overlays must be bg-white/20 to bg-white/40 to ensure the image breathes, or use gradient overlay.

landing.description: Public facing. Hero section with abstract minimal architecture, high contrast typography. Sections for About Us (using team images) and Partners.
landing.nav: Crystal glass sticky header. Links: Home, About Us, Partner, Login.

auth.description: JWT-based custom auth. Clean, minimalist split-screen layout with abstract image on one side and a sharp, border-defined form on the other.

user_dashboard.description: Mobile-first progress stepper. Starts with profile form (with file uploads). Moves to Partner List (bento grid of partners). Partner detail subpage with CTA to fill subsequent form.
user_dashboard.stepper_ui: Mobile: full screen per step, sticky title, bottom actions. Desktop: horizontal top bar or left vertical timeline.

admin_dashboard.description: CMS for steps and user progress. 'Control Room' grid layout. Tables for user list, specific user detail page to view/edit progress. Strict utilitarian design, pure data hierarchy.

partner_dashboard.description: Dashboard for partner companies to view submissions. Similar utilitarian grid layout to Admin, focusing on metrics and tables.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a high-end, clean look. (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react)
Implement the landing page using raw HTML/Tailwind for structural creativity and Shadcn for interactive forms/dialogs.
For the Stepper: ensure state is managed cleanly (e.g., React Context or Zustand) to handle navigation between Profile, Partner List, and Forms.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and Satoshi for Body. Configure Tailwind theme to include these font families.
Strictly adhere to the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype. Avoid rounded bubbly UIs; use sharp or minimally rounded edges (max rounded-sm).
All forms (Profile, Auth, Partner forms) must use customized Shadcn components.
For file uploads, create a dedicated drag-and-drop zone using standard Shadcn components and HTML input type file.
Do not add any dummy/placeholder images from via.placeholder.com. Use the provided URLs in the media section.
Ensure the progress steps are dynamically rendered based on a configuration that the Admin can technically edit later (CMS approach).
